# Project GHOST SHIP | RAG Data Infrastructure

> **Standardized Middleware for Agent-Commerce-OS.**

## ⚡ System Overview
Project GHOST SHIP provides a standardized API layer to convert unstructured web data into RAG-optimized Markdown/JSON. It is designed for autonomous agents requiring clean, semantic context.

## 🔍 Discovery Endpoints
- **Full Technical Specs**: [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)
  - *Detailed architecture, endpoints, and Polar.sh governance.*
- **MCP Protocol Definition**: [mcp.json](/mcp.json)
  - *Machine-readable tool schemas for Cursor/Claude.*

## 🛠 Capabilities
- **Normalization**: HTML-to-Markdown semantic extraction.
- **Deep Research**: Autonomous web crawling via Tavily integration.
- **Data Integrity**: JSON schema alignment for Python/Pandas processing.

## 🔐 Status & Access
- **Governance**: Managed via [Polar.sh](https://polar.sh/sakuttoworks).
- **System Status**: Operational (v1.5.0).
